findings.evidence: `rg -n "weightedAbelJacobiDivisorClass_eq_sum|unweightedAbelJacobiDivisorClass_eq_sum|Finsupp.induction_linear"` shows the weighted theorem at line 121 and the parallel unweighted induction at lines 267-286.
findings.fix: Prove the unweighted statement by specializing `weightedAbelJacobiDivisorClass_eq_sum (fun _ => 1) h rfl D`, with only the necessary unfolding/simp lemmas for the unweighted definitions.
findings.issue: `unweightedAbelJacobiDivisorClass_eq_sum` duplicates the substantial `Finsupp.induction_linear` proof from `weightedAbelJacobiDivisorClass_eq_sum` at line 121, including the same single/add cases and coefficient algebra.

summary: The proofs mostly use stable existing lemmas, but the unweighted finite-support formula repeats the full weighted induction instead of reusing the weighted theorem. Factor the specialization to avoid maintaining two parallel induction proofs.
